'''Set Piece''' was a recurring department of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine from issues 54 to 100 (with the exception of issue 77). It was originally authored by [[Chris Reiff]] and [[Chris Trevas]], but Trevas took over the article beginning with issue 64. From issues 78 through 92, the feature was called '''Technical Readout: Set Piece'''.
